productDisplayName: Nike Unisex Pack of 3 Black Socks
description: Slip your feet into cosy comfort and up your running speed with ease in this set of three socks in black from nike. Engineered with arch support and offering a secure stable Fit, this set offers exemplary comfort.   Made of 77% cotton, 22% nylon and 1% spandex Has a half cushion terry foot for exemplary comfort and shock absorption Inner arch support for a secure and stable fitCare Machine wash cold at 30 degrees Use a non-chlorine bleach if needed Tumble dry low Do not iron or dry clean
